headline: SOL Trades 75% Below ATH While Institutions Rebuild Capital Markets on Its Rails
summary: Solana (SOL) is trading at $68.15 , roughly -75% below its January 2025 all-time high, even as JPMorgan, Visa, PayPal, and Franklin Templeton are actively building on Solana’s infrastructure.
